original_prompt: Systematically verify and finalize 14 view files for RTDB compliance, proper controller event usage, and zero Firestore/onSnapshot legacy code.
rephrased_goal: Final audit and verification of 14 view files to ensure complete migration and controller compatibility.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Verify Batch 1 (appointment_detail, appointments, calendar, dashboard, forms)
tasks.testing_criteria: No Firestore, correct RTDB subscription, no emit errors.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Verify Batch 2 (gantt, items, product_types, reporting)
